message:
feat(core): standard provider names, last-active tracking, workspace normalization

Allow users to type human-friendly names like "claude", "codex-cli", and
"gemini-cli" in addition to internal slugs and aliases.  Provider lookup
now normalises tokens to a canonical form before matching.

`casr list` gains a "Last Active" column derived from the most recent of
mtime/atime on the session file, and sorts by recency rather than bare
started-at timestamps.  Full session IDs are now shown (no truncation)
and provider names are colorised per-provider for quick scanning.

Gemini workspace extraction now normalises file-path candidates to their
parent directory so that paths ending in a filename (e.g.
`/data/projects/foo/README.md`) resolve to the enclosing project dir.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
